Create Data Bin

Follow 3 simple steps to build a Data Bin.

Datasources

Search and select one or more datasources.

search

Files

Upload one or many files to include in this Data Bin.

cloud_upload

Drop files here

Drag and drop files here, or click to browse from your device.

Supports CSV, XLSX, XLS, TXT, PDF, DOCX and JSON.

Name your Data Bin

Give this collection a clear name so it is easy to recognize later.

bookmark
Choose a name that tells you what datasources and files are grouped together.

Included in this Data Bin

Your selected datasources and uploaded files stay visible while you work.
